title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 252.120 - Limitation of prosecution
text:
252.120.  Limitation of prosecution. — Prosecutions for violations of this law and for violations of any such laws, rules and regulations shall be commenced within one year from the date of any such violation, either by indictment, complaint or information.
(RSMo 1939 § 8949, A.L. 1945 p. 664 § 25) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8293; 1919 § 5643; 1909 § 6533
